title: Classified Docs Broken Links As Docs Viewer Report
summary: Recorded that Docs Broken Links should move into Docs Viewer reports rather than becoming another migrated Studio route shell.
effect: The migration plan no longer treats /studio/docs-broken-links/ as a standalone Studio route shell to migrate. The workflow should be rebuilt as a Docs Viewer report because it audits generated docs links by scope. The existing Studio route should remain only until the Docs Viewer report replacement is available and verified.
verification: Docs-only decision recorded; implementation remains pending
